feature1.name: feature_intro
feature1.label: Overview
feature1.title: What This YouTube Name Generator Is Good At
feature1.description: This tool is built for first-time creators who are stuck on naming their channel. Instead of dumping a flat list of random ideas, it generates grouped candidates, scores each one, validates handles, and helps you compare a few strong options side by side so you can launch with confidence.

items.title: Grouped name candidates, not a flat list
items.description: The YouTube Name Generator clusters names into brandable, searchable, and hybrid groups so you can compare angles instead of scrolling through dozens of similar-sounding options.

items.title: Every name is scored and explained
items.description: Each candidate gets four 1-10 scores (memorability, pronounceability, uniqueness, pivot flexibility) and a one-line rationale so you know why it fits your brief.

items.title: Handle-friendly from the start
items.description: Every name ships with a suggested @handle, format validation, warnings on weak patterns, and fallback handles so you can act on it immediately.

how_to_use.name: how_to_use
how_to_use.label: HOW TO USE
how_to_use.title: How to Use the YouTube Name Generator in 3 Steps
how_to_use.description: From blank page to launch-ready channel name in under a minute.

items.title: Describe your channel brief
items.description: Tell the YouTube Name Generator what your channel is about and who it is for. Add a naming style, length, and pivot room to sharpen the output.

items.title: Review grouped, scored names
items.description: Browse candidates grouped by category, read the rationale, and check scores and handle warnings on every card.

items.title: Shortlist, compare, and launch
items.description: Save up to three names to a shortlist, compare them side by side, and copy the recommended launch name and handle.

feature2.name: feature_benefits
feature2.label: Benefits
feature2.title: Why Creators Use the YouTube Name Generator
feature2.description: Naming anxiety is real. This generator moves you from blank page to a name you can confidently launch with.

items.title: Decide, do not just brainstorm
items.description: Scores and a recommended name push you toward a confident choice instead of an endless scroll of maybes.

items.title: Avoid weak patterns early
items.description: Format checks and warnings flag excessive numbers, awkward punctuation, and other patterns that hurt a YouTube handle.

items.title: Local history for retries
items.description: Recent generations stay on your device so you can re-run a winning brief without retyping it.

feature3.name: use_cases
feature3.label: Use Cases
feature3.title: Best Uses for the YouTube Name Generator
feature3.description: Built for first-time creators who want a launch-ready name, not a list of random ideas.

items.title: Launching a brand-new channel
items.description: Move from 'I have no idea what to call it' to 'I can launch with this' in one focused workflow.

items.title: Comparing angles
items.description: See brandable, searchable, and hybrid names side by side so you can pick the angle that fits your growth plan.

items.title: Checking handle-friendliness
items.description: Get format validation, fallback handles, and warnings before you commit to a name on YouTube.

faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: YouTube Name Generator FAQ
faq.description: Short answers about the YouTube Name Generator's scope, privacy, and usage.

items.title: Is this YouTube Name Generator free?
items.description: Yes. You can generate names, save a shortlist, copy names and handles, and revisit recent generations without signing up.

items.title: How many name ideas does the YouTube Name Generator produce per run?
items.description: Each run produces around 24 grouped candidates across brandable, searchable, and hybrid categories, plus one final recommendation.

items.title: What do the four scores on each name mean?
items.description: Memorability, pronounceability, uniqueness, and pivot flexibility are guidance scores (1-10) to help you compare names. They are decision support, not objective truth.

items.title: Does the YouTube Name Generator check live handle availability?
items.description: No. The tool validates handle format, flags weak patterns like excessive numbers, and suggests fallback handles. It does not guarantee that a handle is unclaimed on YouTube.

items.title: Can I use the YouTube Name Generator for non-English channels?
items.description: Yes. Pick an output language in the advanced options and the rationale, warnings, and best-for notes will be written in that language.

items.title: Can I save names and come back later?
items.description: Yes. Save up to three names to a shortlist and revisit recent generations from local history stored on your device.

items.title: Will the YouTube Name Generator work for niche topics?
items.description: Yes. Add keywords and describe your niche as specifically as you can. The more concrete the brief, the stronger the candidates.

items.title: Can I regenerate names if I don't like the first batch?
items.description: Yes. Hit Regenerate to produce a fresh batch using the same brief, or tweak the style and length and run again.
